summary: Docker buildx bake failed when wget attempted to download the nydus release asset from GitHub and received an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway response, causing the build layer to exit with code 1.
root_cause: wget returned HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway when downloading nydus release asset, indicating a transient server or gateway error from GitHub/remote host

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Explicit HTTP 502 status from wget indicates transient remote server/gateway failure

evidence.quote: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: wget command failed due to server error response, causing Dockerfile RUN layer to exit with code 1

evidence.quote: #72 0.149 wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Network error occurred during download of external resource (GitHub release asset), not a build or code issue
Failure occurred at Dockerfile line 336 where nydus release asset is downloaded via wget

suggested_fix: Retry the buildx bake command, as the HTTP 502 is likely transient; optionally add retry logic to the wget command in Dockerfile line 336 (e.g., wget --retry-connrefused --waitretry=1 ...)

summary: Test `test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub]` failed when a pip install command received HTTP 502 Bad Gateway responses from github.com, causing pip to fail with exit code 1 and triggering a test assertion failure.
root_cause: HTTP 502 responses from github.com exceeded pip's retry limit when attempting to download https://github.com/pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip, causing the install command to return exit code 1.

evidence.quote: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: Directly identifies the root cause: HTTP 502 responses from github.com exceeded pip's retry limit
Shows the test assertion failure triggered when the pip install command returned exit code 1 instead of success
The failed command was attempting to download from github.com, which returned 502 errors

suggested_fix: Retry the CI job; this is a transient network/server issue from github.com rather than a code defect in the repository.

summary: Jest test assertion failed in test/config/get.ts because the actual registry URL returned by pnpm config get includes a trailing slash, but the test expected the URL without one.
root_cause: The test assertion on line 32 of test/config/get.ts expects the registry URL 'https://my-org.registry.example.com' but the code returns 'https://my-org.registry.example.com/' with a trailing slash, causing the string equality check to fail.
relevant_tests: pnpm config get reads npm options but ignores other settings from .npmrc

evidence.reason: Shows the expected value in the test assertion
Shows the actual value returned by the code, which includes a trailing slash
Exact assertion code that failed due to the trailing slash mismatch
Stack trace confirms the assertion failure location
Test file failed with specific test execution time

suggested_fix: Update the assertion in test/config/get.ts:32 to expect 'https://my-org.registry.example.com/' with the trailing slash, or modify the registry URL normalization logic to remove trailing slashes before returning the value.
